query: Apple Image Playground Private Cloud Compute generative model architecture photorealistic specifications WWDC26

{"query":"Apple Image Playground Private Cloud Compute generative model architecture photorealistic specifications WWDC26","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1464,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnet.com/tech/services-and-software/apple-wwdc-2026-image-playground-ai-news/","title":"Apple's Image Playground Gets 'Photorealistic' Capabilities With New AI - CNET","content":"At WWDC 2026, Apple shows off new AI image creation and editing tools.
Katelyn is a reporter with CNET covering artificial intelligence, including chatbots, image and video generators.
Her work explores how new AI technology is infiltrating our lives, shaping the content we consume on social media and affecting the people behind the screens.
Apple's creative AI hub Image Playground will be capable of creating "photorealistic" AI images, thanks to new AI models running behind the scenes.
Apple announced the news at WWDC 2026, the company's annual developers conference.
Image Playground is one of Apple's original AI hubs, where you can create images with generative AI.
Now, that content should be more customizable and look less like plastic AI slop.
This WWDC, we're getting our first look at the next generation of Apple software, including iOS 27."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/afraemahsan_apple-image-playground-photorealistic-generation-activity-7471225100940242945-QpLX","title":"Apple Adds Photorealistic Generation to Image Playground | Afraem Ahsan posted on the topic | LinkedIn","content":"Today, ploca is open to everyone. ploca ("sollu" during private beta) is a voice-to-text app for Mac that is truly private.
Privacy is a toggle you have to find. ploca works differently.
Free public beta until 30 August 2026.
Apple Silicon, macOS 13 or later.
This is Part 1 of recap I'm doing on Foundation Framework from WWDC25.
🚀 Just explored Apple's new Image Playground Framework from WWDC26!
It's impressive how easy Apple has made it to integrate AI-powered image generation directly into iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS apps—without managing servers, API keys, or infrastructure.
Anthropic released a Swift package that plugs Claude into Apple's 𝙁𝙤𝙪𝙣𝙙𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣 𝙈𝙤𝙙𝙚𝙡𝙨 framework.
The on-device model does the quick local work, then hands off to Claude for the parts that need real reasoning. ● 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲𝗱 𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗼𝗳𝗳 - Apple's @𝙂𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙧𝙖𝙗𝙡𝙚 returns typed Swift values, so Claude gets clean structured inputs instead of raw text. ● 𝗠𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝘁 - the handoff covers multi-step reasoning, code generation, web search, and code execution. ● 𝗡𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗴 - responses stream straight back into the same SwiftUI view, across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, visionOS, and watchOS 27.
The pattern is the story: on-device for speed and privacy, cloud model for depth, one experience for the user.
A Mac running local AI services.
This means developers can seamlessly switch between on-device AI and Claude for more complex reasoning, larger context windows, tool calling, and web search—all with minimal changes to their existing architecture."}]}

{"query":"Apple Image Playground Private Cloud Compute generative model architecture photorealistic specifications WWDC26","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=skch01qhxDw&vl=en","title":"WWDC26: Create high-quality images using Image Playground | Apple","content":"WWDC26: Create high-quality images using Image Playground | Apple
Apple Developer
314000 subscribers
89 likes
3550 views
8 Jun 2026
Enable high-quality image creation in your app using Image Playground. With a new generative model that runs on Private Cloud Compute, users can make images in virtually any style, including photorealistic, in your app. You can also specify dimensions for use in even more places, and allow people to modify images using natural language descriptions and touch. Explore how to adopt Image Playground, generate images from descriptions and photos, and manage feature availability in your app.

00:00 - Introduction
02:03 - Capabilities
05:02 - Adopt Image Playground
08:29 - Options
12:15 - Availability

App: https://apple.co/DeveloperApp

The Foundation Models Framework is a native Swift API that gives you direct access to the same on-device model that powers Apple Intelligence. #### What’s new in the Foundation Models framework#### Build agentic app experiences with the Foundation Models framework#### Build with the new Apple Foundation Model on Private Cloud Compute#### Bring an LLM provider to the Foundation Models framework#### Debug and profile agentic app experiences with Instruments#### Build AI-powered scripts with the fm CLI and Python SDK#### Improve your prompts by hill-climbing with Evaluations#### Meet the Evaluations framework#### Create robust evaluations for agentic apps#### What’s new in image understanding#### LLM search using Core Spotlight. The App Intents framework is how you can connect your app to Apple Intelligence and features like Siri AI. #### Build intelligent Siri experiences with App Schemas#### Validate your App Intents adoption with AppIntentsTesting#### Explore advanced App Intents features for Siri and Apple Intelligence#### Code-along: Make your app available to Siri#### Discover new capabilities in the App Intents framework.","score":0.27070355,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/introducing-third-generation-of-apple-foundation-models","title":"Introducing the Third Generation of Apple's Foundation ...","content":"Introducing the Third Generation of Apple’s Foundation Models. Our next generation of Apple Intelligence is centered around our users, integrated deeply into our operating systems, and powered by a bold new architecture with privacy at its core. At the heart of this architecture is our third generation of Apple Foundation Models (AFM), a family of five foundation models custom-built in collaboration with Google. These span from on-device models to server-based models running on Private Cloud Compute. * **AFM 3 Core**, the next generation of our 3-billion-parameter dense model that delivers a step up in quality. * **AFM 3 Core Advanced**, our most powerful on-device model. AFM 3 Core, AFM 3 Core Advanced, and AFM 3 Cloud, along with ADM 3 Cloud, are all purpose-built for Apple silicon. We designed the architectures for both our on-device and server-side models to enable powerful Apple Intelligence experiences for our users, and we integrated our latest models deep into our operating systems.","score":0.23999932,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/06/apple-intelligence-brings-powerful-ai-capabilities-into-everyday-experiences","title":"Apple Intelligence brings powerful AI capabilities into ...","content":"An Apple Vision Pro headset, a 14-inch MacBook Pro, an 11-inch iPad Pro, and an iPhone 17 Pro display various user interfaces for Apple Intelligence. A screen on iPhone 17 Pro displays the Passwords app in the process of automatically fixing weak and compromised passwords for various accounts. A 14-inch MacBook Pro screen shows a Safari dialog box for the Create Extension feature on a baking website. An iPhone 17 Pro screen shows a conversation in the Messages app with Add to Reminders and Add to Note suggestions made based on the text.
